status: RATIFIED 2026-07-17 (user go-ahead at spin-up review gate)
name: HYPERSAW
naming_note: Working product title SWARM✱ remains open until the Phase 5 naming decision (see kit README). Repo/manifest use HYPERSAW to match the directory and avoid the ✱ glyph in identifiers.

survey.what_is_it: app — audio plugin: CLAP-native synthesizer instrument, VST3 via clap-wrapper (ADR-002), ported from three validated JS prototypes

architecture_rung.earned_by: the L0-1 parity oracle gives a fresh-context verifier independently checkable ground truth, and DSP debugging benefits from adversarial review. Fleet NOT earned: ADR-001 collapsed the three prototypes into one engine, so seam count is low.

survey.domain_core_llm_must_not_own: the entire runtime DSP core: Kuramoto coupling (sync/splay/topologies), kernels, detune laws, consonance gravity, mulberry32 seeded determinism, no wall-clock in the core (SPEC §5.7). AI proposes/judges at design time; deterministic C++ decides at runtime.

oracle_shape.goldens: strict pinned goldens — L0-1 parity vs the JS reference implementations (ε = 1e-6 RMS) plus trajectory invariants L0-2..13, all in ./verify fast once Phase 1 lands; ./verify fast starts trivially-green (structure/manifest checks), honestly scoped
oracle_shape.layer_e: listening/behavioral checks E-1..E-6 in ./verify full with human sign-off per release
oracle_shape.ci: fast only — pluginval/auval/host-loading checks are macOS-local and human-run

second_implementation.note: this project IS the second implementation: JS prototypes are the reference (ADR-003), C++ is the port, pinned by L0-1. JS headless cores get checked in as golden generators; divergence requires an ADR.

consumes_future: Tonality (Layer-3 ratio priors / context-weighted basins) — brief deferred to Phase 3, before gravity ships; default 13-ratio set is the visibly-degraded placeholder
terrain sibling (private; wavetable kernel / 'every preset is somewhere') — brief deferred to Phase 4; stubbed kernel is the placeholder

lifespan_autonomy.lifespan: long-lived (multi-phase product build, Phase 0→5 to release candidate)
lifespan_autonomy.autonomy_tier: interactive — human at every phase gate and ADR; no unattended operation intended

model_routing.note: doctrine: pin explicitly, never inherit; cap at latest Opus
model_routing.verifier: haiku (verbatim-report role; runs gates, judges nothing)
model_routing.implementer: sonnet (scoped execution once spec is fixed)
model_routing.judgment_bearing_work: parity-oracle design, ADR resolution, DSP debugging stay in the Opus-tier lead, per kit README
